#nullable enable

namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.R Map(global::Demo.S s)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(s);
        return new global::Demo.R(
            X: s.X,
            Y: s.Y)
        {
            Z = s.Z,
        };
    }
}
